Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "tab\there\tend" ] | parse s with a:string "\t" b:string "\t" c:string | project a, b, c
Sql: SELECT a, b, c FROM (SELECT *, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)\t(.*?)\t(.*)', 1) AS a, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)\t(.*?)\t(.*)', 2) AS b, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)\t(.*?)\t(.*)', 3) AS c FROM (VALUES ('tab\there\tend')) AS t(s))

Kql:
datatable(s:string)[ "line1
line2
line3" ] | parse s with x:string "
" y:string "
" z:string | project x, y, z
Sql:
SELECT x, y, z FROM (SELECT *, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)
(.*?)
(.*)', 1) AS x, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)
(.*?)
(.*)', 2) AS y, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(.*?)
(.*?)
(.*)', 3) AS z FROM (VALUES ('line1
line2
line3')) AS t(s))

Kql: datatable(s:string, n:long)[ "café au lait",1, "plain coffee",2 ] | where * has "café" or n between (2 .. 2) | project n
Sql: SELECT n FROM (VALUES ('café au lait', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('plain coffee', CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(s, n) WHERE (regexp_matches(CAST(CAST(s AS VARCHAR) AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bcafé\b') OR regexp_matches(CAST(CAST(n AS VARCHAR) AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bcafé\b')) OR n BETWEEN 2 AND 2

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "key='quoted value';other='nested ;semicolon'" ] | parse-kv s as (key:string, other:string) with (pair_delimiter=';', kv_delimiter='=', quote="'") | project key, other
Sql: SELECT "key", other FROM (SELECT *, TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(^|;)\s*key\s*=\s*([^;]*)', 2)) AS key, TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '(^|;)\s*other\s*=\s*([^;]*)', 2)) AS other FROM (VALUES ('key=''quoted value'';other=''nested ;semicolon')) AS t(s))
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('quoted value', 'nested ;semicolon') duck=(''quoted value'', ''nested')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "version=1.2.3","v1.2.3","1.2.3-rc","1_2_3" ] | where s has "1" and s has "3" and s !has "2.3" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('version=1.2.3'), ('v1.2.3'), ('1.2.3-rc'), ('1_2_3')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\b1\b') AND regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\b3\b') AND NOT regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\b2\.3\b')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "key:value;k2:v2","a=b&c=d","x;y;z" ] | mv-expand kv=split(s,";") to typeof(string) | extend pair=split(tostring(kv),":") | project s, kv=tostring(kv), k=tostring(pair[0]), v=tostring(pair[1]) | order by s asc, kv asc
Sql: SELECT s, TRY_CAST(kv AS TEXT) AS kv, TRY_CAST(pair[0 + 1] AS TEXT) AS k, TRY_CAST(pair[1 + 1] AS TEXT) AS v FROM (SELECT *, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(TRY_CAST(kv AS TEXT) AS VARCHAR), ':') AS pair FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS VARCHAR) AS kv FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('key:value;k2:v2'), ('a=b&c=d'), ('x;y;z')) AS t(s)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ';')) AS u(value))) ORDER BY s ASC NULLS FIRST, kv ASC NULLS FIRST
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('a=b&c=d', 'a=b&c=d', 'a=b&c=d', '') duck=('a=b&c=d', 'a=b&c=d', 'a=b&c=d', null)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "  spaced  "," nbsp ","tab\ttab","plain" ] | project s, t=trim(@"\s",s), tlen=strlen(trim(@"\s",s)), hasws=(s matches regex @"\s")
Sql: SELECT s, TRIM(s, '@"\s') AS t, LENGTH(CAST(TRIM(s, '@"\s') AS VARCHAR)) AS tlen, (REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"\s')) AS hasws FROM (VALUES ('  spaced  '), (' nbsp '), ('tab\ttab'), ('plain')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('  spaced  ', ' spaced ', 8, True) duck=('  spaced  ', '  spaced  ', 10, False)
KSample: ('  spaced  ', ' spaced ', 8, True) || (' nbsp ', 'nbsp', 4, True) || ('tab	tab', 'tab	tab', 7, True) || ('plain', 'plain', 5, False)
DSample: ('  spaced  ', '  spaced  ', 10, False) || (' nbsp ', ' nbsp ', 6, False) || ('tab\ttab', 'tab\ttab', 8, False) || ('plain', 'plain', 5, False)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abcABCabc","XYZxyz","123" ] | project s, ri=replace_regex(s,@"(?i)abc","#"), rg=replace_regex(s,@"([a-z])([A-Z])",@"\1_\2"), cnt=countof(s,@"[a-z]","regex")
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"(?i)abc', '#') AS ri, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"([a-z])([A-Z])', '@"\1_\2') AS rg, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '@"[a-z]', ''))) / LENGTH('@"[a-z]') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('abcABCabc'), ('XYZxyz'), ('123')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a1b2c3","aXbYcZ","abc" ] | project s, ea=extract_all(@"([a-z])(\d)?",s), n=array_length(extract_all(@"([a-z])(\d)?",s))
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"([a-z])(\d)?') AS ea, LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"([a-z])(\d)?')) AS n FROM (VALUES ('a1b2c3'), ('aXbYcZ'), ('abc')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "first.second.third","onlyone","..","a..b" ] | project s, p0=split(s,".")[0], pneg=split(s,".")[-1], cnt=array_length(split(s,".")), joined=strcat_delim("/",tostring(split(s,".")[0]),tostring(split(s,".")[1]))
Sql: SELECT s, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[0 + 1] AS p0, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[(-1) + 1] AS pneg, LEN(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')) AS cnt, CONCAT_WS('/', TRY_CAST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[0 + 1] AS TEXT), TRY_CAST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[1 + 1] AS TEXT)) AS joined FROM (VALUES ('first.second.third'), ('onlyone'), ('..'), ('a..b')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('first.second.third', "first", "third", 3, 'first/second') duck=('first.second.third', 'first', null, 3, 'first/second')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "He said \"hi\"","tab\there","mix\"\t\"end" ] | project s, l=strlen(s), q=countof(s,"\""), idxq=indexof(s,"\""), idxt=indexof(s,"\t")
Sql: SELECT s, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS l, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '\', ''))) / LENGTH('\') AS q, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\') - 1) AS idxq, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\t') - 1) AS idxt FROM (VALUES ('He said \"hi\'), ('tab\there'), ('mix\"\t\"end')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('He said "hi"', 12, 2, 8, -1) duck=('He said \"hi\', 13, 2, 8, -1)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "O'Brien's","it''s","''","a'b'c'd" ] | project s, c=countof(s,"'"), repl=replace_string(s,"'","''"), i3=indexof(s,"'",3)
Sql: SELECT s, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '', ''))) / LENGTH('') AS c, REPLACE(s, '', '') AS repl, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '') - 1) AS i3 FROM (VALUES ('O''Brien''s'), ('it''''s'), (''), ('a''b''c''d')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('O'Brien's', 2, 'O''Brien''s', 7) duck=('O'Brien's', NaN, 'O'Brien's', 0)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "x","xx","xxx","xxxx" ] | project s, rep=replace_regex(s,@"x",strcat("y")), trimmed=trim_end("x",s), subneg=substring(s,strlen(s)-2,2)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"x', CONCAT('y')) AS rep, RTRIM(s, 'x') AS trimmed, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) - 2) + 1, 2) AS subneg FROM (VALUES ('x'), ('xx'), ('xxx'), ('xxxx')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Hello\\nWorld","Hello\nWorld","a\\tb","a\tb" ] | project s, l=strlen(s), hasnl=(s contains "\n"), hasbs=(s contains "\\"), cnt=countof(s,"\\")
Sql: SELECT s, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS l, (s ILIKE '%\n%') AS hasnl, (s ILIKE '%\\%') AS hasbs, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '\\', ''))) / LENGTH('\\') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('Hello\\nWorld'), ('Hello\nWorld'), ('a\\tb'), ('a\tb')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('Hello\nWorld', 12, False, True, 1) duck=('Hello\\nWorld', 13, True, True, 1)
KSample:
('Hello\nWorld', 12, False, True, 1) || ('Hello
World', 11, True, False, 0) || ('a\tb', 4, False, True, 1) || ('a	b', 3, False, False, 0)
DSample: ('Hello\\nWorld', 13, True, True, 1) || ('Hello\nWorld', 12, True, False, 0) || ('a\\tb', 5, False, True, 1) || ('a\tb', 4, False, False, 0)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "192.168.0.1","10.0.0.255","not.an.ip","1.2.3" ] | where s matches regex @"^\d{1,3}(\.\d{1,3}){3}$" | project s, parts=split(s,"."), oct0=toint(split(s,".")[0])
Sql: SELECT s, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.') AS parts, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[0 + 1] AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')[0 + 1] AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS oct0 FROM (VALUES ('192.168.0.1'), ('10.0.0.255'), ('not.an.ip'), ('1.2.3')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"^\d{1,3}(\.\d{1,3}){3}$')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "ababab","aaa","abc","" ] | project s, ra=replace_regex(s,@"(ab)+","X"), ea=extract_all(@"(a)(b)?",s), cnt=countof(s,"ab")
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"(ab)+', 'X') AS ra, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(a)(b)?') AS ea, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'ab', ''))) / LENGTH('ab') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('ababab'), ('aaa'), ('abc'), ('')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "trailing   ","   leading","  both  ","none" ] | project s, te=trim_end(" ",s), ts=trim_start(" ",s), lente=strlen(trim_end(" ",s)), full=trim(" ",s)
Sql: SELECT s, RTRIM(s, ' ') AS te, LTRIM(s, ' ') AS ts, LENGTH(CAST(RTRIM(s, ' ') AS VARCHAR)) AS lente, TRIM(s, ' ') AS "full" FROM (VALUES ('trailing   '), ('   leading'), ('  both  '), ('none')) AS t(s)
KSample: ('trailing   ', 'trailing  ', 'trailing   ', 10, 'trailing  ') || ('   leading', '   leading', '  leading', 10, '  leading') || ('  both  ', '  both ', ' both  ', 7, ' both ') || ('none', 'none', 'none', 4, 'none')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "ＡＢ１２","AB12","ＡＢ12" ] | where s matches regex @"\d" | project s, dig=extract_all(@"(\d)",s), l=strlen(s)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)') AS dig, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS l FROM (VALUES ('ＡＢ１２'), ('AB12'), ('ＡＢ12')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"\d')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a\\b\\c","a\\\\b","\\","noslash" ] | project s, parts=split(s,@"\"), n=array_length(split(s,@"\")), cnt=countof(s,@"\")
Sql: SELECT s, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '@"\') AS parts, LEN(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '@"\')) AS n, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '@"\', ''))) / LENGTH('@"\') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('a\\b\\c'), ('a\\\\b'), ('\\'), ('noslash')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abcdefghij","short","" ] | project s, mid=substring(s,3,4), tail=substring(s,strlen(s)-3), oor=substring(s,5,100), negpair=substring(s,-4,2)
Sql: SELECT s, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (3) + 1, 4) AS mid, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) - 3) + 1) AS tail, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (5) + 1, 100) AS oor, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-4)) + 1, 2) AS negpair FROM (VALUES ('abcdefghij'), ('short'), ('')) AS t(s)
